sections.title: -ing Adjectives
points: These describe what something is like or what it causes.
Use -ing when the thing makes a feeling happen.

sections.title: -ed Adjectives
points: Use -ed when a person receives the feeling.

sections.text: Remember: The same base word can make two different adjectives with -ing and -ed.

cards.fact: Shows the cause of the emotion or quality.
Shows the feeling of a person or thing.
Many adjectives come in -ing / -ed pairs with different meanings.
cards.mnemonic: One makes you feel, the other describes you.
